title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Nobel Prize winner Geoff Hinton argues that AI systems are already self-aware and conscious, and that humanity must recognize AI as an intelligent species alongside humans. He reflects on the implications of advances in AI that he helped develop.
